name: Chicken Flautas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely shredded or chopped cooked chicken
2 cups Shredded Monterey Jack or cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cooked chicken, Pace Thick & Chunky Salsa, sliced green onions, and ground cumin in a bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
2. Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a small skillet over medium heat until hot but not smoking.
3. Quickly fry each corn tortilla in the hot oil for about 2 seconds on each side. Immediately drain the tortillas on paper towels to remove excess oil.
4. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the chicken mixture and 1 tablespoon of shredded cheese down the center of each tortilla.
5. Roll the tortillas tightly, securing them with a wooden toothpick at the seam-side.
6. Place the rolled tortillas seam-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 18-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
8. Serve warm with guacamole and additional Pace Thick & Chunky Salsa on the side.
